name: Beer Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 6 oz can spicy V-8® vegetable juice
2 pounds lean ground beef (up to 3 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, half cup chopped onions, Italian breadcrumbs, and eggs. Form the mixture into small meatballs.
2. Fry or bake the meatballs until cooked through.
3. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients: remaining beer, spicy V-8® vegetable juice, lemon juice, hot sauce, ketchup, prepared horseradish, Worcestershire sauce.
4. Simmer the sauce for 15 minutes.
5. Place the meatballs and simmering sauce into a crockpot. Ensure the sauce covers the meat.
6. Allow the mixture to simmer in the crockpot for at least 3 hours (or longer for better flavor). Stir occasionally.
7. Adjust seasoning by adding more ketchup or spicy V-8® vegetable juice if desired, and adjust heat level with additional hot sauce as preferred.
